question_structure.context: The rotor of a sinusoidal AC generator is a square coil with $n=100$ turns and side length $L=20\mathrm{cm}$. It is placed in a uniform magnetic field with magnetic induction $B=0.5\mathrm{T}$. Under the action of an external force, it rotates uniformly around an axis perpendicular to the direction of the magnetic field at an angular velocity of $\omega=100\pi$ (rad/s). Timing starts when the plane of the coil is perpendicular to the direction of the magnetic field. The resistance of the coil is $r=1\Omega$, and the external circuit resistance is $R=99\Omega$.
question_structure.sub_question_1: Write the expression for the instantaneous value of alternating current; do not add any other content.
question_structure.sub_question_2: The power consumed by the external resistor; do not add any other content.

sub_question_1.step_1: The maximum induced electromotive force is: $E_{m} = N B S \omega = 100 \times 0.5 \times (20 \times 10^{-2})^{2} \times 100 \pi \mathrm{V} = 200 \pi \mathrm{V}$
sub_question_1.step_2: According to Ohm's law for a closed circuit, the maximum value of the induced current is: $I_{m} = \frac{E_{m}}{R + r} = \frac{200 \pi}{99 + 1}  \mathrm{A} = 2 \pi  \mathrm{A} \approx 6.28  \mathrm{A}$
sub_question_1.step_3: The instantaneous value expression of the alternating current is: $i = 6.28 \sin (100 \pi t) \mathrm{(A)}$

sub_question_2.step_4: The effective value of the current is: $I = \frac{I_{m}}{\sqrt{2}} = \frac{2 \pi}{\sqrt{2}}  \mathrm{A} = \sqrt{2} \pi  \mathrm{A}$
sub_question_2.step_5: From $P = I^{2} R$, the power consumed on the external resistor is: $P_{R} = (\sqrt{2} \pi)^{2} \times 99  \mathrm{W} = 198 \pi^{2}  \mathrm{W}$

sub_question_3.step_6: The power of the external force: $P_{out} = I^{2} (R + r) = (\sqrt{2} \pi)^{2} \times (99 + 1)  \mathrm{W} = 200 \pi^{2}  \mathrm{W}$

step_1.physical_theorem: Faraday's law of electromagnetic induction (for a rotating coil)

step_2.physical_theorem: Ohm's law for a closed circuit

step_4.physical_theorem: Relationship between effective and maximum values of sinusoidal AC

result_quantity.name: Power consumed on the external resistor
